title: Onboarding - What's new screen - Updating from previous app version
scenario: Verify that after updating from an older app version (pre-5.0.0.X) to the latest, the "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen appears on launch and tapping "Get Started" dismisses it to the Home Screen.
steps: Launch the app after updating from an older version (before 5.0.0.X) to the latest version.
Observe the screen that appears upon launch.
Check that the user is taken to the Home Screen.
expected: The "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen appears upon launch. After tapping "Get Started", the screen is dismissed and the user is brought to the Home Screen.
